metro_lines.name: Yellow Line
metro_lines.data_source: DMRC ridership data 2023-24, Yellow Line is the busiest corridor

metro_lines.name: Blue Line
metro_lines.corridor: Dwarka Sector 21 - Noida Electronic City / Vaishali
metro_lines.data_source: DMRC ridership data 2023-24, includes Blue Line branch to Vaishali

metro_lines.name: Green Line
metro_lines.data_source: DMRC ridership data 2023-24, Green Line extension operational

metro_lines.name: Pink Line
metro_lines.data_source: DMRC ridership data 2023-24, ring line connecting outer Delhi

suburban_rail.data_source: No suburban rail system in Delhi NCT; RRTS (Regional Rapid Transit System) under construction as of 2024

bus_network.data_source: DTC Annual Report 2023-24 and DIMTS cluster bus scheme data; combined DTC (approx 3600 buses) and cluster (approx 2100 buses) operations

transport_network.total_daily_pt_ridership_data_source: Estimated sum of metro (2.043M) + bus (3.8M) ridership; excludes auto-rickshaws, taxis, and ride-hailing which add approx 2M additional trips

economic_baseline.data_source: Median income estimated from NSSO PLFS 2022-23 Delhi urban MPCE data scaled to household level (avg HH size 4.2); Gini from NSSO consumption expenditure distribution 2022-23; formal employment from EPFO enrollment data vs total workforce estimates; sectors from Delhi Economic Survey 2023-24

validation_anchors.data_source: DMRC 2024 published ridership figures for Phase 4 corridors

validation_anchors.outcome: confirmed no significant reduction in pollution or traffic congestion
validation_anchors.data_source: IIT Delhi + TERI post-scheme analysis 2016; EPCA monitoring data
